subcodes.first_line: O Qasim! Upon thee be My glory! Hibatu'llah, upon him be My glory, made mention of thee. We make mention of thee that thou mayest rejoice and be among them that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا قاسم علیک بهائی هبه الله علیه بهائی ذکرت نمود ذکرناک لتفرح و تکون من
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
